query: SELECT sb.sortOrder AS ord, LEFT(sb.title, 50) AS title, sb.curriculumTopicId AS topic, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM curriculumResources cr WHERE cr.topic_id = sb.curriculumTopicId) AS topicResources, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM curriculumResources cr WHERE cr.topic_id = sb.curriculumTopicId AND cr.kind = 'worksheet') AS topicWorksheets, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM curriculumResources cr WHERE cr.topic_id = sb.curriculumTopicId AND cr.kind = 'video') AS topicVideos, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookAssignments ba2 WHERE ba2.blockId = sb.id) AS bookRefs FROM scheduleBlocks sb JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = sb.planId WHERE dp.date = '2026-05-28' ORDER BY sb.sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT sb.sortOrder AS ord, LEFT(sb.title, 50) AS title, sb.curriculumTopicId AS topic, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM curriculumResources cr WHERE cr.topic_id = sb.curriculumTopicId) AS topicResources, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM curriculumResources cr WHERE cr.topic_id = sb.curriculumTopicId AND cr.kind = 'worksheet') AS topicWorksheets, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM curriculumResources cr WHERE cr.topic_id = sb.curriculumTopicId AND cr.kind = 'video') AS topicVideos, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookAssignments ba2 WHERE ba2.blockId = sb.id) AS bookRefs FROM scheduleBlocks sb JOIN dailyPlans dp ON dp.id = sb.planId WHERE dp.date = '2026-05-28' ORDER BY sb.sortOrder;
